label: KSafe
description: Karoo safety extension on two layers: REACTIVE (crash detection, SOS, check-in, HR-based medical episode and wellness detection) and PREVENTIVE (carb and hydration tracking that adapts to your effort using the Karoo's HR and power zones, reminding you to fuel before bonking or dehydration impair your judgment on the bike). Sends emergency alerts via WhatsApp (CallMeBot), Telegram, Pushover or ntfy. Beta — test before relying on it.
releaseNotes: Major upgrade. Fueling upgrades and customisation. Two new at-a-glance carb data fields: KSafe Carb Burn Rate (instantaneous g/h, modulated by your HR/power zone) and KSafe Carbs Burned (cumulative grams the body should have burned this session) — companions to the existing Carb Status deficit field. The FIT export grows to four developer fields per ride (logged carbs, burned carbs, current burn rate g/h, hydration ml) so Strava / Intervals.icu / TrainingPeaks can plot fueling alongside HR and power. Three new beep-pattern pickers (Carbs, Hydration, Wellness) let you choose between Off, Single long beep, Double short pip, Rising triple chime or Urgent pulse — emergency-level beeps stay on the urgent default by design. Idle field-colour palette widened from 12 to 16 hues, adding brown, indigo, dark cyan and burgundy for clearer button differentiation in sunlight. Backup export now pre-fills every empty alert text field (carb / hydration / medical / three wellness tiers) with its current default so you can edit the wording in JSON without guessing what the default looks like. Existing configs auto-migrate; default behaviour is unchanged for riders who don't touch the new pickers.
